warnings: Action bundles are candidate-only suggestions to PQX. Admission belongs to AEX, execution to PQX, control to CDE.
MET never marks a bundle as canonical-owner action. State stays proposed until AEX produces a build_admission_record.
failure_prevented: MET emitting an action bundle that looks like an execution request and bypassing AEX admission.
signal_improved: Each bundle candidate names its source slice, scope boundary, do-not-touch surface, required evidence, and its readiness_state — pointing AEX/PQX/CDE at a bounded next bundle.

bundle_candidates.failure_prevented: Bundle for long-horizon replay coverage being assembled outside AEX admission flow.
bundle_candidates.signal_improved: Bundle candidate is bounded to the slice scope and references the canonical AEX admission path.
bundle_candidates.scope_boundary: Add per-dimension long-horizon status field to REP replay_record. Reference from EVL eval coverage.
